{"perspective": "Product Strategist", 
"findings": [{"file_path": "apps/api/app/routers/skills.py", 
"what_exists": "Skills Execution Router with one endpoint for all skills", 
"what_it_does": "Reads skill markdown files, injects user data, calls LLM, returns structured output", 
"quality_assessment": "Code is well-structured, but Wave-3 package bootstrap is complex and may be improved"}], 
"summary": "The skills.py file is a critical component of the v0Laura engine, executing skills and providing output to users. While the code is generally well-structured, there are areas for improvement, particularly in the Wave-3 package bootstrap.", 
"next_files_to_read": ["memory/swarm/skills/", "packages/atlas-core/python"], 
"whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.what_exists: Skills Execution Router with one endpoint for all skills
findings.what_it_does: Reads skill markdown files, injects user data, calls LLM, returns structured output
findings.quality_assessment: Code is well-structured, but Wave-3 package bootstrap is complex and may be improved

summary: The skills.py file is a critical component of the v0Laura engine, executing skills and providing output to users. While the code is generally well-structured, there are areas for improvement, particularly in the Wave-3 package bootstrap.
